overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the streets of Night City. The character navigates narrow neon-lit alleys, briefly enters an adult club with distinctive teal cylindrical displays, then continues through bustling urban streets with elevated highways and Asian-inspired architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with fast food storefront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the alley past the Buck-A-Slice pizza shop

entered.detail: fast food restaurant with illuminated signage and blue awning
blue fabric awning extending over the sidewalk
yellow fabric awning over outdoor seating area
bright red plastic chairs arranged outside the storefront
metal barrel with flames emitting from the top

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow commercial alley in the early morning, passing by the Buck-A-Slice pizza shop with its distinctive blue and yellow awnings. Red plastic chairs sit outside the establishment, and a burning trash can provides ambient light on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: adult entertainment club with neon lighting and display cylinders

events.description: enters building through beaded curtain doorway
exits building back to the alley

agents.ego_description: enters the adult club, views the interior neon displays, then exits back to the alley

entered.detail: red neon sign indicating adult content restriction
purple neon sign with triple X lettering
two large transparent cylindrical tanks with teal lighting containing figures
red neon heart-shaped sign with cursive love text
doorway covered with hanging black beaded curtains

segments.scene_description: The character enters an adult entertainment club through a beaded curtain, revealing an interior illuminated by vibrant neon signs including an 18+ warning and a heart-shaped love sign. Two distinctive teal cylindrical displays dominate the room before the character exits back to the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley with red lanterns transitioning to commercial street

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider street with elevated highway structures

agents.ego_description: navigating through back alleys toward the main commercial street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: stacked cardboard boxes piled against the wall
multiple external AC units mounted on the building wall
traditional Asian-style red paper lanterns hanging overhead
massive industrial ventilation fan built into the building facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the club, the character moves through narrow back alleys lined with cardboard boxes and air conditioning units. Red paper lanterns hang overhead as the space opens into a wider commercial street with a large industrial ventilation fan visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved city street with elevated highways and canal

events.description: large industrial truck drives along the road ahead
turns right following the curved sidewalk along the highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved roadside sidewalk next to moving traffic

notable_agents.action: large green industrial truck driving along the curved road

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure with multiple levels
large illuminated digital advertisement screens on building facades
narrow water canal running parallel to the street
tree with pink cherry blossoms illuminated by sunlight
silver metal safety railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved city street beneath massive elevated highway overpasses. A canal runs parallel to the left side while digital billboards and cherry blossom trees line the right. A large green truck drives ahead on the road as the character follows the curving sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with street signage and pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: approaches the Allen Street intersection with traffic lights
crosses the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaches the intersection and crosses the street at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian waiting at the street corner near the traffic light

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading Allen mounted on a pole
yellow and white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the road
traffic signal lights suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching the Allen Street intersection, the character reaches a crosswalk marked with yellow lines. A green street sign marks the corner as the character waits for traffic and then crosses the street, with neon-lit buildings and digital billboards visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, gritty commercial alleyway into the expansive, neon-lit urban sprawl of Night City. It begins by passing a Buck-A-Slice pizza shop with blue and yellow awnings and a burning trash can, before the camera glides through a beaded curtain into an adult club filled with vibrant neon signs and teal cylindrical displays. Upon exiting back into the alley, the view pushes past cardboard boxes and red paper lanterns as the narrow space opens into a wider street featuring a large industrial ventilation fan. The scene then expands further as the camera follows a curving sidewalk beneath massive elevated highway overpasses, passing a parallel canal and cherry blossom trees while following a large green truck. Finally, the movement leads to the Allen Street intersection, where the character crosses a yellow-lined street against a backdrop of towering digital billboards and glowing skyscrapers.
